description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run Tests that runs on every push and pull request. Use a job matrix to test on ubuntu-latest with multiple Python versions, including 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11, and pypy3.9. For each job, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, upgrade pip, install tox and tox-gh-actions, and run tests with tox.
